task_description: find all directories containing more than 100 files
code: find . -type d -exec sh -c 'echo "$(find "{}" -type f | wc -l) {}"' \; | sort -nr | head -20

task description:

task description: find all directories containing more than 100 files

```bash
find . -type d -exec sh -c 'echo "$(find "{}" -type f | wc -l) {}"' \; | grep -E '^[0-9]+ ' | awk '$1 > 100 {print $2}'
```
